mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ow_report WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_no = #{targetNo} AND reporter_id = #{reporterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_report(no, target_type, target_no, reporter_id, reason) VALUES(seq_ow_report_no.NEXTVAL, #{targetType}, #{targetNo}, #{reporterId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT no, target_type, target_no, reporter_id, reason, status, TO_CHAR(reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_report ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_report SET status = #{status} WHERE no = #{no}
